summary_en: Correction to May 15, 2026 buyback disclosure. Issued shares outstanding (excl. treasury) adjusted from 715,428,374 to 715,828,374 shares. No change to buyback program terms or treasury stock holdings (1,506,899 shares).
title_en: Notice of Partial Correction to "Notice Regarding Decision on Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Cancellation of Treasury Stock"
translation_en_brief: This is a correction notice to the May 15, 2026 disclosure on treasury stock acquisition and cancellation. Subaru identified a clerical error in the reference section (ご参考) concerning the count of issued shares outstanding (excluding treasury stock) as of March 31, 2026. The figure was corrected from 715,428,374 shares to 715,828,374 shares—an upward adjustment of 400,000 shares. The treasury stock holding remained unchanged at 1,506,899 shares. No other terms of the underlying buyback program were modified. This amendment serves to align the reference data with accurate corporate records.
